properties.name: Feature: Steadfast5e - Gritty Realism Rest
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Part of the Steadfast5e suite. Overhauls 5E rest and recovery to create meaningful attrition: configurable short/long rest durations, limited HD spending, optional CON/Endurance check for HD recovery after long rest, fractional HP recovery, and scope controls per creature type. Optional integration with Steadfast5e - Location System for per-tier overrides.
